player_notes.brandon ingram: Posted a season-high 38 pts vs Heat; reinforces elite scoring upside in a Raptors offense with playoff positioning motivation.
player_notes.alex sarr: Out for final 3 games of the season with a toe injury — remove from all prop consideration.
